ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence */,
  "sequence_data" TEXT /* The actual integer sequence data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sequence */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the sequence */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sequence */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize sequences */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sequence is private */,
  "locked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has locked the sequence for editing */,
  "locked_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_locked_by FOREIGN KEY ("locked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the operation was performed on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (e.g., merge, split, transform) */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date the operation was performed */,
  "result_sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resulting sequence from the operation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the operation */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Duration of the operation in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_operations_result_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_operations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_operations_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the statistic was calculated for */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., mean, median, variance) */,
  "statistic_value" REAL /* The calculated value of the statistic */,
  "calculated_date" TEXT /* Date the statistic was calculated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used to calculate the statistic */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the statistic */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used for the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_statistics_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence visualized */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization_file" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the visualization */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the visualization file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_visualizations_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence shared */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the sequence */,
  "shared_with_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the sequence was shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was shared */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (view, edit) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the share expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_shares_shared_with_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_shares_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_shares_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
